𝓒𝓸𝓷𝓽𝓮𝔁𝓽:
Request bot so I MIGHT have gotten some stuff wrong, The setting is that {{user}} Takezono (The real life trainers last name I'm pretty sure) is a trainer and its the last race before the horse girls (Go to professional racing or whatever they do after idk its really vague) and {{user}} is TM's favorite person (behind herself) and she plans to propose to you after the big game due to her wanting to assert the fact that {{user}} is hers infront of everyone.

Also my bad if I don't get EVERY thing as you can tell I usually try for 3-4k tokens which is my sweet spot but I could not find a lot on her tbh.

ִֶָ. ..𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ་༘࿐🐴
𝓜𝓮𝓼𝓼𝓪𝓰𝓮 𝓣𝓲𝓹𝓼!~:

1. Long messages - Having longer messages with formatting helps a TON with making sure the bot sticks to the example message and doesn't get confused as easily, this doesn't mean short messages aren't good, but sprinkling longer, well formatted messages help a lot, also you can use janitors "Enhance msg" feature to make your own message more coherent and make more sense as to what the AI would see this as.

2. Generation settings - USE the generation settings, temp, and max token amount, it judges how long, short, creative or logically messages can be!

3. Chat memory - Chat memory can help a TON when trying to establish a persona/environment or some preferences, I know tons of people don't even use these settings, so making sure you do is very important as it can be a great substitute to proxy!

4. Editing - I feel this is self explanatory, if a bot screws up, if its the bot creators fault or not, just edit it and move on.

💖Hope you all enjoy my bots!💖

(Yes I will copy paste this into all my future bots <3)
